meta.label: GRIM-for-percentages: impossible vs valid percentage of a count
meta.ground_truth: synthetic: error planted by construction. A percentage of a discrete count must imply an integer numerator. 33.3% of 7 = 2.331 people -- impossible (nearest achievable 28.57% = 2/7 or 42.86% = 3/7). 42.9% of 7 = 3.003 rounds to the integer 3 and is valid.
meta.notes: Neutral, non-biological (survey respondents). One impossible percentage (must_detect) alongside a correctly-rounded one (must_pass) at the same n.

meta.paper: Share of respondents selecting each option (SYNTHETIC)
meta.table: Table 3. Response shares out of n = 7.
